---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Debug Log

If an error alert appeared in the UI, please download the debug log and attach it here:

1. When the error alert appears, click the **"Debug Log"** download button.
2. A `.json` file will be downloaded (all personal information is automatically redacted).
3. Drag and drop the file into this issue, or use the attachment button below.

## Environment

- **App Version:** (shown in the debug log or app footer)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 115)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Linux)
- **Deployment:** (e.g., Docker on Raspberry Pi, local development)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or information about the problem here.
